coverage.is_catalog_description_helper_lines_657_: all hit (was 0 hits on lines 659-665 in v3)

mutation_tests.mutation: Drop variable.set from Add.ExamplesForLlm() natural form
Swap chain order — variable.set first, math.add second
mutation_tests.note: Per-op render tests use Contains-only assertions and would NOT catch this — relies entirely on the spec-level cross-action test for chain integrity.

mutation_tests.mutation: Change A=5 to A=99 in natural form
Flip line 664 of IsCatalogDescription: return true -> return false

findings.issue: Per-op render tests (Subtract_BothForms_RenderChain / Multiply / Divide / Power) use Contains() assertions only and do not assert that 'variable.set' appears in the rendered RHS-form output (only Add_RhsForm asserts both). A renderer regression specific to non-Add ops in the RHS path would lean on the spec-level AllArithmeticActions test alone.
findings.impact: Acceptable — the cross-action test pins Chain[1].Module=='variable' and Name=='set' for all 5 ops. Mutation 2 confirmed this catches chain swap.
findings.suggestion: Optional: add Contains("variable.set") to the rhs render assertions in Subtract/Multiply/Divide/Power tests for redundant coverage.

findings.issue: Add_NaturalForm_RendersAddThenSet asserts Contains("A([object] 5)"). The [object] tag is brittle to a Data.@this refactor (e.g., changing Add.A from Data.@this to Data.@this<int> would change [object] to [int]).
findings.impact: Intentional pin on the current type-mapping contract; flagged so future refactors know which test to update.
findings.suggestion: None — keep as-is; the brittleness is the feature.

findings.issue: F4 cluster untouched: 23 PLang test failures across Signing (9), Identity (2), UI (2), Event (3), Goal-call (1), ContextVars (1), Crypto (1), Test/Discover (1), ErrorTypes (1), App/SetupGoal (1), ConditionCompound (1), ForeachDictionary (1) + ForeachCallsGoalPerItem.
findings.impact: Real production runtime regressions from the v2 builder squash 50351d8b, accepted as separate-branch work by the coder (coder v1 explicit scope).
findings.suggestion: Carryover — track but do not block this branch. F4 should be addressed in a follow-up branch.

summary: approved — V3-1 (IsCatalogDescription helper, 14 unit tests) and V3-2 (math ExamplesForLlm renders, 7 unit tests) closed cleanly with strong unit tests. C# 2288 -> 2309 (+21). Coverage on the helper match-true path went 0/9 -> 9/9. Mutation tested 4 representative regressions — all 4 caught. F4 cluster (23 reds) remains as explicit carryover. Recommend hand to security analyst.
